---
title: "index.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/skills_db/cachebro/packages/cli/src/index.ts"
loc: 98
complexity: 11
logic_score: 4.35
style_score: 3.99
intel_score: 2.62
overall_score: 3.66
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 1 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [startMcpServer](file://./mcp.js)

### Exports
- `command`
- `cacheDir`
- `dbPath`
- `createCache`
- `stats`
- `home`
- `mcpServersEntry`
- `opencodeMcpEntry`
- `xdgConfig`
- `targets`
- `configured`
- `dir`
- `config`
